special_mechanics.name: Hockey Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ice hockey-based movement on slippery surface with puck physics

special_mechanics.name: Hazard Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Land mines and holes present on ice that affect player movement and positioning

special_mechanics.name: Fight Minigame
special_mechanics.description: Combat mechanic where players knock out opponents with separate physics

special_mechanics.name: Corpse Physics
special_mechanics.description: Dead player bodies remain on ice and can be tripped on; cleared between periods

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and design overview but no quantitative physics parameters. Movement characteristics are not documented in available sources. Game is ice hockey sport title with focus on environmental hazards and combat rather than character movement precision.
